notes: Source: data/history/source-screenshots/financial/2023.png.
The screenshot uses placement-based columns plus Champ Ring and Rollover to 2023.
Weekly payout totals are visible but are not included in the Amount Won column for this season.
Mike E has $205 in the 1st Place column but $0 in Amount Won; that value is preserved in manager notes and not treated as a paid award.
Mike M has $80 in Champ Ring and $205 in Amount Won while the 1st Place column shows $0; both visible values are preserved.
The footer shows Weekly Payout $140, Champ Ring $80, 4th Place $25, 3rd Place $50, 2nd Place $100, 1st Place $205, Amount Won $380, Entry Fee Paid $580, Rollover to 2023 -$20, and Total Earned -$200.
newOwnerFee and futureDeposit are null because the screenshot does not label any amount as a new-owner fee or future deposit; rollover values are captured in notes only.
regularSeasonWeeks and actualRingCost are null because they are not shown.
